svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="stability-overview" id="stability-overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-515" dy="-187" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="大型Web应用稳定性
(持续稳定运行)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="异常监控体系
(稳定性生命线)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="40" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="核心目标

零重大宕机
低异常率
快故障恢复" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="180" x="40" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="覆盖层面(四类监控)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="280" x="300" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="前端监控

(加载快 · 不报错 · 不偏移)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="260" x="680" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="J" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="业务逻辑稳定
